campaign.title: Welcome to Your Community Media Network
campaign.subject: [Community Name] has a local media network — here's what that means for your business
campaign.description: First contact — introduce what Fibonacco is in concrete terms

landing_page.ai_goal: Make the business owner understand what we are and claim their listing

slides.title: Your Community's Media Network

content.headline: [Community Name] Has a Local Media Network
content.subhead: We are your community's newspaper, event calendar, business directory, website network, and newsletter.
content.visual: Network diagram showing all 5 properties connected

slides.narration: Your community has a local media network. We are your newspaper, your event calendar, your downtown guide, your website network, and your community newsletter. No other organization does all of this for your community. Let me show you what that means for your business.

slides.title: What We Are

content.headline: Five Things. One Network. Your Community.

slides.narration: Here's what we are. Day.News publishes daily community news. GoEventCity is the event calendar. Downtown Guide is the business directory. AlphaSite gives businesses a professional web presence. And our newsletter reaches thousands of local subscribers every week. Everything is connected.

slides.title: Nobody Else Does This

content.headline: Not Facebook. Not Google. Not Yelp.
content.key_point: No other organization provides a complete local media network for [Community Name]. We help local businesses reach their local customers through real community media.
content.visual: Comparison showing fragmented vs. connected presence

slides.narration: Nobody else does this. Facebook is social media, not local news. Google is a search engine, not a community directory. Yelp is reviews, not community media. We do all of it — news, events, directory, web presence, newsletter — connected and built specifically for your community.

slides.title: Your Community Now
slides.narration: Here are your community's numbers right now. Real numbers, not projections. This is how many people are reading, how many subscribers get the newsletter, how many businesses are listed, and how many premium positions are available.

slides.title: Claim Your Listing

content.headline: Your Listing Is Ready
content.body: We already created your business listing from public information. Claim it to verify, edit, and go live.
content.trust: Free. No credit card. Takes 5 minutes.

slides.narration: Your business listing already exists in our directory. We created it from public information. Claim it to verify your details, add photos, and go live. Free. No credit card. Takes five minutes.

slides.title: Your Account Manager

content.headline: I'm [AM Name] — Your Account Manager
content.body: I'll keep you updated on [Community Name] and make sure your business has the best position available.

slides.narration: I'm your account manager. I'll be in touch this week with more details about how your business can participate. In the meantime, claim your listing. It's the first step.

email_intro.subject: [Community Name] has a local media network. Here's what that means for your business.
email_intro.preview_text: Your community's newspaper event calendar and business directory
email_intro.body:
Hi [First Name],

I'm [AM Name], your account manager at [Community Name] Day.News.

I'm reaching out because we are your community's local media network. Specifically, we are:

→ [Community Name]'s local newspaper — we publish daily community news read by [X] residents
→ [Community Name]'s event calendar — GoEventCity promotes every local event to [Y] event seekers
→ [Community Name]'s downtown guide — the definitive local business directory
→ [Community Name]'s website network — AlphaSite gives participating businesses a professional web presence
→ [Community Name]'s community newsletter — [Z] subscribers get weekly updates featuring local businesses

No other organization does all of this for [Community Name]. Not Facebook. Not Google. Not Yelp. Us.

We have 37 positions for businesses who want premium placement across the entire network. For [Category], there are [X] slots. [Y] are already taken.

I'd like to get your business set up. The first step is claiming your listing — it's free and takes 5 minutes.

[CLAIM YOUR LISTING →]

I'll be in touch with more details this week. If you have questions, reply to this email or call me at [phone].

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News

email_intro_reminder.subject: Did you see my note about [Community Name]'s media network?
email_intro_reminder.preview_text: Your community has a local newspaper and business directory
email_intro_reminder.body:
Hi [First Name],

Quick follow-up. I reached out a few days ago about [Community Name] Day.News — your community's local newspaper, event calendar, business directory, and website network.

Your business listing is ready to claim. Free. Takes 5 minutes.

[CLAIM YOUR LISTING →]

[X] businesses in [Community Name] have already claimed theirs. Your [Category] has [Y] of [Z] premium slots remaining.

If you want to know more about what we do before you claim anything:

[SEE WHAT WE DO →]

[AM Name]
[Community Name] Day.News
